productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Black Wallet
description: A perfect ensemble for your dresses, this clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy sequined upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials. Sequined outer for style Has a press closure with a detachable metallic chain handle One organiser pouch on the inside to hold your mobile Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
